title: lantana triplinervia var. hispida
intro: Lantana triplinervia var. hispida, also known as yellow button or small button bush, is a plant species that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lantana triplinervia var. hispida include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical applications, to harness its medicinal properties.
